feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP Security
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP Security Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Alert Notifications when new user is created
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using API we are creating/deleting a user in BTP CF. Is it possible to trigger btp notification alerts whenever a user is deleted or created?

I have subscribed to alert notification services in subaccount. I have to define the condition in the alert notification subscription. How to define for the above scenario

Is there any doc/blog/tutorial for this? Please help

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: SAP GSOAP VERSION DISCLOSURE VULNERABILITY
entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing security issue, SAP gsoap exposes its version information during network scanning,

Any ways to hide the version related information from SAP application ?

entry.title: How to accept request param inside a custom CDS service entity
entry.content:
entity description{
language : String;
shortDescription : String;
longDescription  : String;
deleted : Boolean default false;
Books   : Association to one Books;
}
 
entity Books : cuid ,managed {
     title : String;
     author : String;
     deleted : Boolean default false;
     to_description : Composition of many description
on to_description.books = $self;
}
 
BooksService.cds
 
service BookService{
 
  entity Book as projection on Books;
 
  entity BookList as 
select 
title,
author,
to_description.shortDescription as shortDescription
 
from Book 
where deleted = false; 
}
 
 
The current implementation of the BooksService.cds returns all descriptions associated with a book when the list service is invoked. However, the requirement is to modify the service to accept a parameter, Accept-Language, which specifies the preferred language for the description. Based on this language parameter, the service should filter and return only the description that matches the specified language.
 
To achieve this, the service needs to be updated to accept the Accept-Language parameter as a request parameter. Upon receiving the request, the service should extract the language preference from the Accept-Language header and use it to filter the descriptions associated with the books. Only the description that matches the specified language should be included in the response.
 
Please provide a solution that demonstrates how to modify the BooksService to accept the Accept-Language parameter and filter descriptions based on the specified language preference.

entry.title: Object Privilege Assignment is failing to a Role in SAP HANA Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP HANA Cockpit, I have logged in as 'DBADMIN' and I have created a role 'ZRole' inside schema 'MYSRP' where 'MYSRP' schema was generated from CAP project mta.yaml file (as shown in below screenshot).

Inside role 'ZRole' I want to create Object Privilege and trying to add a Table object 'APP_SALES_COURSES' which is from another schema 'MYSALES_HDI_MYSALES_DB_DEPLOYER_1' (as shown in below screenshot).

On clicking 'Save' --> I am getting 'insufficient privilege' error.  

Am i missing something / performing wrong steps ? Kindly guide

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP Warehouse number
entry.content:
Hi all,

how to get warehouse number /SCWM/LGN for assigning parameter to particular person in EWM PRD SYSTEM

Thanks,

Sai

entry.title: Who created service instance on BTP ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I was not able to figure out a way to find who(user) created the service instances. Is there a way from CLI or from BTP dashboard ?

Thanks
-Aman

entry.title: Regarding SAP Build Apps Authentication issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am Sugandha. I have been using SAP Build Apps for quite some time and I am facing issues while configuring SAP BTP destination REST API integration. When I am testing the inputs, it gives me error 404. I have followed all the steps given in the below tutorial (attaching the link). - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html#23115af3-8c2e-487a-b50a-ecdc7c8a8fce (please refer to step no.5 for my query. I am stuck on that). As per the error, my definition ID is incorrect but I am just copy-pasting it.

Attaching an image for your refernce - 

 

Please guide me. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: CAP or RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I'm a SAP ABAP developer, I well trained in SAP UI5, OData and ABAP. For my future career opportunities what should I choose CAP or RAP which is going to be enlarged in future business perceptions. 

Need your advice. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: BTP - SAP Custom Domain Service - Pricing
entry.content:
Dear community,
I ask for your support for a clarification regarding the "SAP Custom Domain Service" service on BTP.

On the pricing page it is not clear whether the requested price also concerns subdomains.
If I activate a domain then can I create infinite subdomains without extra costs?

Thank you

entry.title: BTP req.authInfo is blank
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have build a cds service based on the examples provided by SAP in Techbytes and opencloud 2020 tutorials. The only difference between the examples and my solution is that I am using a managed approuter. I have bootstrapped the express as per the tutorial and its working as per expected. Any odata and rest api calls are directing properly with xsuaa authentication done. 

As part of the custom validation api, I want to use the checkScopes functionality using req.authInfo.checkScopes. I have also tried req.user.is() as well. Any req.user or authInfo are blank. i found a few community answers that suggested req._.user but these are blank as well.

Example followed.

https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-opensap-cloud-2020/blob/main/srv/routes/admin.js

My server.js, routes and express.js file is uploaded here in github.

https://github.com/anandmuthu1978/ExampleSrv/tree/main

Hope somebody can shed some light into the matter. 

Thanks.

Anand Muthu

entry.title: Is there any impact from the addition of additional NAT and LB IP addresses?
entry.content:
We have been notified that additional NAT and LB IP addresses will be added.
However, I am not confident in how to verify the region.

With the addition of this IP address, will it be necessary to add a whitelist with IPSADMIN basic authentication?

I would like to know which applications this change will affect.
Please let me know.

Kind regards,
Koko

entry.title: which option is better regarding integration between BTP subaccount access and IAS
entry.content:
<scenario>

Currently, customer has subscribed one BTP global accounts. they would like to access various subaccounts through IAS according to requirement, so we need to activate the IAS for BTP subaccounts.

We are currently implementing Successfactors (SF) system, and have created the IAS per SF instance to access SF through IAS, with the relationship SF:IAS=1:1; At the same time, We enhanced several  Fiori applications in BTP for SF system, and set up SSO between SF and BTP in order to directly access these Fiori applications through SSO from the SF side. Now we would like to activate IAS for BTP as well so that we can access both SF and BTP through IAS.

<Confirmation>

For integrating the IAS with BTP, we understand that IAS tenant is created per Subaccount, because we have created IAS tenants per SF. which is better between creating new IAS per BTP subaccount and using the existing IAS of SF? or is there any other better solution? Can you give me some suggestions? Thank you.

1. For BTP subaccount, we do not create a new IAS, but still use the existing IAS created by SF. Attachment ①

2. For BTP subaccount, do not use the existing IAS created by SF, but create a new IAS . Attachment ②

In addition, we can now access the Fiori application on BTP from SF by configuring SSO. If we use the attachment ② solution, because SF and BTP use different IAS, Is there be any problems affecting access to Fiori application? Please help confirm.

best Regards.

entry.title: Assigning an Existing Tenant to SAP BTP Subaccount
entry.content:
Hi

Through the link below, we can associate the BTP subaccount with the existing default IAS by creating a default IAS on the BTP subaccount, Currently, we do not want to associate it with the Default IAS, but automatically associate it with the specified IAS (not default IAS).  Can you share the specific implementation method? Or do I need to manually add BTP subaccount as the Source system to the existing IAS tenant?

https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-authentication/identity-authentication/tenant-model-and-licensing?locale=en-US#assigning-an-existing-tenant-to-sap-btp-subaccount

 

best Regards.

Zhang

entry.title: Role collection export - import
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I created severel collections roles (around 10) with their dedicated role assignments into an active subaccount for sustainability apps (SFM-RDP-SCT).

I would like to export and import these new role collections to another subaccounts. I did not find standard procedure to run it.

Is there a way to run export and import flow for a selected range of collection roles ? Thanks in advance for your answers.

Best regards,

Hervé

entry.title: Calculation Procedure
entry.content: what is calculation procedure in vistex and how it is useful for rebate calculations

entry.title: Connect CPI-PI to CI-DS via BTP client ID & secret
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any way to use BTP client secret & ID in CPI-DS datastore as user Id & password to connect another cloud platform (i.e. CPI-PI) which is already a part of BTP integration suite via subaccount?

Currently we are connecting to CPI-PI (SOAP webservices) via technical user in a SOAP type datastore in DS, and business wants to evaluate if there is any option to connect CI-DS & CPI-PI webservices via BTP using client secret & ID to replace the use of technical users in CI-DS datastore.

Please suggest.

 

Note - The reason to connect CI-DS with CPI-PI is that there are multiple 3rd party system which is connected via API and the endpoint of the same is exposed to CI-DS via CPI-PI as SOAP services.

3rd party API -> CPI-PI (SOAP webservice) -> CI-DS SOAP datastore via technical user (Current architecture) 

Thanks,

Ratan

entry.title: odata services are not loaded when the app is ran locally from BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 Odata metadata are not loaded while running app locally on BAS also in BTP launchpad (cloud foundry). which was working fine previously. Is it because of any version updates or do I need to update version? 

The same set of Odata Service metadata are loaded in onPremise system as expected.

entry.title: The provided authorization grant is invalid
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am getting the error: The provided authorization grant is invalid. Exception was: There is no trust between entities and https://eu2.hana.ondemand.com/services in client 027

when entering the following parameters in BTP destination:

 

followed this tutorial blog: 
https://community.sap.com/t5/customer-relationship-management-blogs-by-sap/configuring-oauth-2-0-between-sap-hybris-cloud-for-customer-and-sap-cloud/ba-p/13323502

entry.title: Paste multiple values to the table by VBA
entry.content:
Hello!

I need to paste the multiple values from Excel to the table control using VBA.

The data is being pasted only by the last visible row, I cannot paste them all, cannot even do it manually (I think it should be possible as clipboard, but cannot find it in this table).

I have found here solutions like Clipboard method but I am not able to use them, because it is not VBA and I do not know this programming language.

Can someone please help me with that problem?

entry.title: Change the email address of a BTP user
entry.content:
Is there any way we can change the emails of BTP users?
My question is related to the users we can see under the Security users in BTP Cockpit. We are using our own LDAP user directory.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
